caption: A man is seated in a recording studio, speaking into a professional microphone. In the initial scene, he wears a white cap, black headphones, and a black hoodie featuring the text "BOSS TALK." He sits before a white backdrop with the words "Where BOSSES Talk!" and a repeating "UNION HUSTLE" logo with stars. As the sequence progresses, the focus shifts to another man wearing a green baseball cap, black headphones, and a green t-shirt that reads "I CAN NEVER DO SHIT AT WORK." This man is actively gesturing with his hands while speaking into a microphone. The studio background includes framed photographs and a clothing rack with mannequins. Overlaid on the bottom of the frames are logos for "BOSS TALK" and "BORN REALLY TO IT." The scene transitions from the first speaker to the second, who continues talking and gesturing.
